text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Okay! I'm back to full strength and feelin' great!
choice_data_list: You seem ready to take on the world!
You seem ready to take on the world!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I took the chance to promote an entire
week of health awareness back at the dorm!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
We all ate lots of hearty food, had long soaks in
the bath, and slept nice and long!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to all that, I'm feelin' fantastic! But best of
all...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Seeing everyone happy and healthy makes me
feel even better!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Spending time with her dormmates has Hishi
Amazon completely refreshed and ready to go!
